mapper.select: SELECT tenant_id AS tenantId, config_key AS configKey, config_value AS configValue, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM tenant_configs WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY config_key
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tenant_configs (tenant_id, config_key, config_value, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{configKey}, #{configValue}, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, config_key) DO UPDATE SET config_value = EXCLUDED.config_value, updated_at = NOW()
